en.ahmedali: Then cast him to be burnt in Hell;
en.ahmedraza: “Then hurl him into the blazing fire.”
en.arberry: and then roast him in Hell,
en.daryabadi: Then in the Scorch roast him
en.hilali: Then throw him in the blazing Fire.
en.itani: Then scorch him in the Blaze.
en.maududi: then cast him in the Fire,
en.mubarakpuri: "Then throw him in the blazing Fire."
en.pickthall: And then expose him to hell-fire
en.sarwar: then throw them into hell to be heated up therein.
en.shakir: Then cast him into the burning fire,
en.wahiduddin: and then let him enter Hell.
en.yusufali: "And burn ye him in the Blazing Fire.
fa.ghomshei: تا بازش به دوزخ در افکنید.
fa.khorramdel: سپس او را به دوزخ بیندازید. [[«صَلُّوهُ»: او را داخل آتش کنید (نگا: نساء / 10، ابراهیم / 29، یس / 64).]]
fa.makarem: سپس او را در دوزخ بیفکنید!
fa.mojtabavi: سپس به دوزخش در آريد- يا بسوزانيد-.
